violations.text: At the time of inspection, the ceiling over the storage area hallway towards the secondary register location was observed leaking/dripping onto the floor. PIC is to move the single-use items on the shelving in the area and store in a location as to not be possibly contaminated by an active leak from the roof. (Items moved at time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026
The nonfood-contact surfaces of the Ice Machine were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2026

The receptacle in the men's/women's shared toilet rooms are lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

At the time of inspection, the following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of rapair: - The ceiling was observed to be dripping onto the floor in the storage area hall towards the secondary register location (raining day of inspection). - The tile grout lines in areas of the kitchen were observed to be worn/deteriorated Physical facilities are to be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2026

At the time of inspection, the hand sink in the backroom area was observed to have a clogged drain. Per the PIC, a workorder ticket was created for the unclogging of the drain for proper hand sink operation. Handsink drain is to be cleared as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

The nonfood-contact surfaces of the Ice Machine were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. (Per the PIC, ice production is to be turned off for proper cleaning) New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The chemical filling station attached to the wall and faucet at the mop sink area was observed to have a filler tube/attachment area leaking water when not in use. Plumbing system is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2025

The ice machine is lacking a proper air gap (Currently equipped with an Air Break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Condensate drain is to properly adjusted to be equipped with a proper Air Gap at the floor drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2025

At the time of inspection, the dumpster area enclosure (inside and outside) was observed to have debris and old grease spill. Dumpster areas are to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed with an accumulation of dust and debris... - The backroom floor area near back door observed with debris and old grease - The ceiling vent to the ventilation system near the walk-in cooler was observed with an accumulation of dust The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2025

An unnecessary, unused, and/or non-functional large grease transfer pump container was observed in the backroom area (full of old grease). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2025

At the time of inspection, the letter of approval for using time as a public health control for approved vegetable items and cheese was not available to the inspector. Copy of letter was printed for the PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

At the time of inspection, the low boy freezer unit in the kitchen area was observed in need of repair/adjustment. The low boy freezer door was observed to not close/seal properly (door slightly tilted with a gap at the gasket area of the top of the door). Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
